questions: You mentioned that swapping 'McKinsey-style' for 'professional format' made the prompt 'basically break' — what specifically went wrong in the output, and why do you think those two semantic anchors produced such different results?
When you added the Q&A step to the feature spec generator, you said the token overhead seemed negligible — did you actually measure it, and how did you decide it was worth the quality improvement?

You called out Claude for confidently claiming streaming only 'seems' faster when it's actually faster for time-to-value — how are you planning to handle moments like that going forward, where the AI sounds authoritative but might be subtly wrong?
